positive: A bioluminescent forest scene integrated with cosmic nebula elements. The composition should feature a central, stylized grouping of oversized, geometric flora (ferns, mushrooms, glowing leaves) intertwined with celestial patterns. Use a deep jewel-toned palette: vibrant sapphire blues, ethereal mint greens, and glowing magenta accents against a midnight black background. The art style should be highly detailed, clean linework illustration, resembling a modern digital etching or enamel print. Focus on strong contrast and defined silhouettes. The light source should emanate softly from within the flora and nebulae, creating a dramatic rim-lighting effect. The overall aesthetic must be magical, symmetrical, and perfect for repeating print application.
negative: blurry, artifacts, noise, text, watermark, logo, signature, excessive detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, copyright, trademark, poor composition, grayscale, sketch, amateur, photo, realistic, messy
